creator: cmt@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Konstantin from comment #4)
> It is correct in other programs like media players

pulseaudio can do per-source audio routing (as an audio system usually does, these days). So please check and do not guess if the firefox audio stream is routed to the correct output (yes, even the cheap onboard soundchip usually presents multiple outputs, and it gets even worse when you add things like Bluetooth and HDMI into the mix). So far, this is the only complaint I've seen, and people usually are rather vocal if they lost sound on youtube.
